file.content:
{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js && npm run build:resume-pdf",
    "build:resume-pdf": "tsx scripts/resume/build-pdf.ts",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "ship-gate:projects": "tsx scripts/ship-gates/projects.ts",
    "ingest": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts",
    "ingest:rebuild": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts --rebuild"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",
    "@mdx-js/react": "^3.1.1",
    "@next/mdx": "^16.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-visually-hidden": "^1.2.4",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "@vercel/analytics": "^2.0.1",
    "framer-motion": "^12.38.0",
    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "axe-core": "^4.11.3",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0",
    "jsdom": "^29.0.2",
    "prettier": "^3.8.3",
    "stylelint": "^17.8.0",
    "stylelint-config-standard": "^40.0.0",
    "tsx": "^4.21.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

{
  "name": "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer",
  "version": "0.0.4",
  "description": "Claude tokenizer",
  "author": "Anthropic <support@anthropic.com>",
  "types": "dist/cjs/index.d.ts",
  "main": "dist/cjs/index.js",
  "type": "commonjs",
  "repository": "github:anthropics/anthropic-tokenizer-typescript",
  "license": "Apache-2.0",
  "private": false,
  "scripts": {
    "test": "yarn jest",
    "build": "bash ./build",
    "prepack": "yarn build",
    "format": "prettier --write .",
    "tsn": "ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register",
    "fix": "eslint --fix --ext ts,js ."
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@types/node": "^18.11.18",
    "tiktoken": "^1.0.10"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer": "link:.",
    "@types/jest": "^27.5.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin": "^5.33.0",
    "@typescript-eslint/parser": "^5.33.0",
    "eslint": "^8.22.0",
    "eslint-plugin-unused-imports": "^2.0.0",
    "jest": "^28.1.0",
    "prettier": "rattrayalex/prettier#postfix-ternaries",
    "ts-jest": "^28.0.2",
    "ts-node": "^10.5.0",
    "tsc-alias": "^1.6.9",
    "tsconfig-paths": "^3.12.0",
    "typescript": "^4.8.2"
  }
}

content.text:
Two failures. Let me fix:
1. Heading inheritance should update as chunks absorb new headings.
2. The 5000-char test is timing out — overlap calculation is too slow with sentence-splitting on large content.
I'll fix both issues — heading update when absorbing new headings, and performance of `takeLastTokensText` using direct tokenizer encode/decode.

content.text:
All acceptance checks pass:
- `scripts/llm/chunker.ts` exists ✓
- `scripts/llm/chunker.test.ts` — 6 tests pass ✓
- Typecheck clean ✓
- Uses Anthropic's official tokenizer (`@anthropic-ai/tokenizer`) ✓

Tests cover all four required behaviors:
1. Markdown 3 headings + 5 paragraphs → correct `.section` and `.heading` per chunk
2. Code fences not split (and inline links preserved verbatim)
3. 5000-char document → multiple chunks with overlap (`charStart` of chunk N < `charEnd` of chunk N-1)
4. Transcript with 6 user-assistant pairs → 2 chunks (3 pairs each), plus an overflow test verifying targetTokens-driven closure

Side change: extended `vitest.config.ts` `include` to also pick up `scripts/**/*.test.{ts,tsx}` so the verification command finds the file. Added `@anthropic-ai/tokenizer` as a dev dependency.
